howItWorks.title: Share the story
howItWorks.desc: Add the recipient's name, occasion, profession, relationship, interests, reference image, and emotional prompt.

howItWorks.title: Preview concepts
howItWorks.desc: Choose from polished mock AI directions that show pose, mood, palette, base style, and gifting intent.

howItWorks.title: Customize details
howItWorks.desc: Select size, finish, color language, packaging, engraving, and special notes before production.

howItWorks.title: Approve and track
howItWorks.desc: Place a mock order, review summary, and follow a live-like production timeline until delivery.

categories.name: Career Milestone Figurines
categories.desc: Doctor, founder, chef, teacher, artist, athlete, or corporate farewell pieces with signature props.

categories.name: Family & Couple Keepsakes
categories.desc: Warm story-backed gifts for parents, partners, siblings, weddings, anniversaries, and birthdays.

categories.name: Pet & Tribute Pieces
categories.desc: Sensitive keepsakes for beloved pets, special people, or moments that deserve a lasting form.

categories.name: Seasonal Gift Drops
categories.desc: Curated mock collections for Diwali, New Year, housewarmings, weddings, and team celebrations.

testimonials.name: Megha A.
testimonials.quote: The whole experience felt premium, from concept preview to the final packaging.

testimonials.name: Varun P.
testimonials.quote: It did not feel like a random custom gift. It felt like someone actually understood the story.

testimonials.name: Ankit & Rhea
testimonials.quote: Our anniversary piece became the centerpiece of the celebration.

faq.q: Is this connected to a backend?
faq.a: No. This demo uses local JSON mock data, localStorage, and static pages so the UI can be reviewed without infrastructure.
The mock previews represent style direction. A real production version would include approval and revision steps before printing.
Yes. The customization and checkout flows include notes, engraving, packaging, and contact details for revisions.
The flow captures recipient details, relationship context, hobbies, reference imagery, owner-led storytelling, and keepsake-specific finishing options.
